LAW AND MOTION 301, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - OPPOSING PARTY APPEARED. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS KRISTEN COLLINS AND JAMES COLLINS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 5 DAYS TO ANSWER FROM THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PLAINTIFF IS TO SERVE THE DEFENDANTS BY PERSONAL DELIVERY, NOTICE TO BE PLACED IN KEY BOX AND POSTED ON DOOR OF APARTMENT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

Off Calendar Mar-04-2003 Continued To Mar-10-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
Notice Of Motion For Sanctions For Disobedience Of Discovery Order

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie- Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Plaintiff, Beresford Corporation dba Beresford Manor was represented by Andrew H. Lange, Esq. and there being no appearance by Defendant James Collins, the matter is ordered off the settlement conference calendar, request for jury trial is sticken and the trial date is confirmed.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew H. Lange, Esq. of LANGE & LANGE 981-7386, for plaintiff Beresford Corp. dba
Beresford Manor and opposing party
* No appearance by defendants. Counsel represented to the Court that defendant's opposition paper was filed. Counsel also notified plaintiff of his intention to appear today for the argument. The Court ordered the notice filed.
** The Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs KRISTEN COLLINS and James Collins' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer from the notice of entry of order. Plaintiff is to serve the defendants by personal delivery, notice to be placed in key box and posted on door of apartment. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (JJM/301/) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR 7855
